title: Antenatal follow-up
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Defines routine antenatal documentation, risk review at every visit, history and record review, patient concerns, shared decisions, counselling, care plans, and high-risk referral boundaries.

source.title: Antenatal Care Standard
source.population: Pregnant women and adolescent girls receiving pre-conception or antenatal care.
source.setting: DoH-licensed healthcare providers delivering antenatal care in Abu Dhabi.
source.exclusions: Direct for routine antenatal documentation in Abu Dhabi; partial for high-risk or complication-specific care and for use outside Abu Dhabi.
